page.name: Vocal FX
page.pad1: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'echo' 0.75 0.5 0.25 0.65 'Mute Source:on' : off & effect_active 'echo' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.pad2: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'beat grid' 0.35 & padfx 'echo' 0.5 0.55 0.75 0.5 0.5 'Mute Source:off' 'Trailing Stop:on' : off & effect_active 'beat grid' off & effect_active 'echo' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.pad5: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'echo' 0.75 0.65 0.25 0.65 'Mute Source:on' : off & effect_active 'echo' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.pad4: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'distortion' 0 0.32 0 0.75 & padfx 'filter hp' 0.25 0 : off & effect_active 'distortion' off & effect_active 'filter hp' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.pad3: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'enigma jet' 0.5 0.75 : off & effect_active 'enigma jet' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.pad8: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'cut' 0.90 0.35 0.05 'Mute Beats:off' & padfx 'echo' 0.3 0.4 0.35 0.6 'Mute Source:off' : off & effect_active 'cut' off & effect_active 'echo' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.pad7: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'delay' 0.1 0.3 & padfx 'reverb' 0.5 0.5 0.45 0.2 'Wet Only:off' & padfx 'flanger' 0.35 0.6 0.6 0.4 : off & effect_active 'reverb' off & effect_active 'flanger' off & effect_active 'delay' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.pad6: down ? on & set 'beatMS' `get_bpm & param_1_x & param_multiply 60000` & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & set 'voxLoopCycle' 0 & effect_stems 'vocal' on & repeat_stop 'voxRoller2' & quantize_loop on & padfx 'loop roll' 0.9 0.75 & repeat_start 'voxRollerWait' 1bt 1 & nothing & get_var 'beatMS' & param_cast 'ms' & repeat_start 'voxRoller' & effect_slider 'loop roll' 2 -20% & cycle 'voxLoopCounter' 2 & var 'voxLoopCounter' 0 ? repeat_stop 'voxRoller'& get_var 'beatMS' & param_cast 'ms' & repeat_start 'voxRoller2' & effect_slider 'loop roll' 1 -15% & cycle 'voxLoopCycle' 6 & var 'voxLoopCycle' 0 ? repeat_stop 'voxRoller2' : nothing : nothing : off & repeat_stop 'voxRoller2' & effect_active 'loop roll' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
page.shift_pad3: down ? on & set 'VoxFXcount' `var 'VoxFXcount' ? get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add 1 : get_text '1' & param_cast val` & effect_stems 'vocal' on & padfx 'flanger' 0.5 0.65 0.7 0.5 & padfx 'phaser' 0.5 0.65 0.75 0.5 0.5 : off & effect_active 'phaser' off & effect_active 'flanger' off & get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_equal 1 ? effect_stems 'vocal' off & set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1` : set 'VoxFXcount' `get_var "VoxFXcount" & param_add -1`
